Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's nothing I need to do here right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It sounds busy inside. I shouldn't go in...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like I can get[n]any more medicine today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like he has[n]anything else to say to me today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It sounds like the teacher is in a good mood.[n]Maybe I can hear a supplementary lesson...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Elizabeth asked me[n]to get her some potent medicine...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mr. Edogawa might know about[n]medicine. I could ask him about it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like there aren't any more[n]supplementary classes to take...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems he will only see[n]me if I'm feeling tired.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should try coming when I'm feeling tired[n]from exploring Tartarus the previous night...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right now, the Temperance Arcana[n]may help me grow even more...[n]{f 1 1}
